enriched_points.expanded_content: iML1515 is a comprehensive metabolic model of E. coli K-12 MG1655, comprising 2712 reactions and 1516 genes, facilitating predictive analysis of metabolic behavior.
The iML1515 model has been instrumental in optimizing production pathways for bio-based chemicals, enabling efficient conversion of substrates into valuable products such as biofuels and bioplastics.
Metabolic pathways can be optimized using iML1515 through constraint-based modeling, allowing for targeted modifications that enhance yield and reduce byproduct formation.
